[150:44]at stopping these people, Trump is going to have to use extraordinary political will.

[150:51]He is going to have to summon an extraordinary political will to resist the pull and the pressure.

[151:05]all we can do is speak out. All we can do is demonstrate to the president that his base,

[151:11]his supporters, the Republican voters, the Republican base, the conservatives do not support
